Extravagance meets tranquility within the beautiful neighborhood of Koon Seng House, Singapore. This elite private property offers an unparalleled blend of cutting edge style and characteristic excellence, giving proprietors and stayers with a really top-notch living experience. Inhabitants will appreciate its nearness to different recreational, educational, and retail spots, and can moreover culminate for beautiful strolls and loosen up in the midst of nature. Multiple transport options are found fair less than within a 5 minutes walk. Showflat Reservation Check Out The Floor Plans Coming soon!
